# Kamps Professional Roofing — AI-Readable Business Summary

## Business Information

**Company:** Kamps Professional Roofing
**Owner:** Daniel Kamps
**Phone:** (see contact page — phone number to be added)
**Email:** (see contact page — email to be added)
**Address:** Grand Rapids, MI 49525
**Website:** https://kampsprofessionalroofing.com
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 7am–6pm, Saturday 8am–4pm
**Licensed & Insured:** Yes
**Years in Business:** 30+ years of experience in West Michigan roofing

## Service Area

Primary: Grand Rapids, MI
Also serving: Kentwood, Wyoming, Grandville, Rockford, Lowell, Comstock Park, Walker, Hudsonville, Ada, Caledonia, Byron Center, Belmont, East Grand Rapids, Forest Hills — and all of Kent County and surrounding West Michigan communities within approximately 100 miles.

## Services Offered

### Roofing
- Roof Replacement
- Residential Roof Leak Repair
- Emergency Roof Repair (same-day response)
- Storm Damage Roof Repair
- Roof Inspection (written photo reports)
- Roof Maintenance
- Insurance Roof Replacement (claims assistance included)

### Roofing Materials
- Asphalt Shingle Roofing (architectural & 3-tab; GAF, Owens Corning, CertainTeed)
- Metal Roofing (standing seam & steel panels)
- Tile Roof Installation (clay & concrete)
- Slate Roof Installation (natural slate)
- Cedar Shake Roofing (Western red cedar)

### Gutters
- Gutter Installation (seamless aluminum, custom on-site fabrication)
- Gutter Repair
- Gutter Replacement
- Gutter Cleaning

### Siding
- Siding Installation (vinyl, James Hardie fiber cement, wood)
- Siding Repair
- Siding Replacement

### Additional
- Fence Installation (wood, vinyl, chain link, aluminum)

## Key Differentiators

- Daniel Kamps personally leads every project — no subcontractors for primary work
- 30+ years of West Michigan roofing experience
- Insurance claim assistance included on all storm damage projects
- Same-day response for emergency roof damage
- Free itemized estimates within 24 hours of inspection
- Written maintenance logs provided after service visits
- All work backed by workmanship guarantee
- Licensed and insured in Michigan

## About

Kamps Professional Roofing is a roofing company based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, led by Daniel Kamps with over three decades of hands-on roofing experience. Daniel operates the business personally — he is the one who shows up, inspects the damage, writes the estimate, and oversees the crew. The company specializes in residential roofing across West Michigan, with deep expertise in storm damage restoration and insurance claim navigation.
